text: A care journey can begin with something simple: being heard.
Meet Maya. Today, getting to care means distance, time, and one more unfamiliar system.
At a trusted Health Equity Hub, she opens SozoRock Health. On a Health Access Day, local support and a prepared provider pathway are ready.
Maya says, I need help finding care near me. The guide confirms her request in plain language.
With permission, the Resident Access Layer checks county, language, digital readiness, and providers ready to serve New York residents.
A clear option appears. Maya chooses it, then moves securely to the provider's own platform.
SozoRock does not diagnose, prescribe, or replace care. It makes the path to a licensed provider easier to follow.
One calm conversation. One clearer next step. Access where people live.
